titleStmt.title: SII 37.318: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 318. (A.R. No. B 425 of 1940-41.) Koṟṟapādu, Jammalamaḍugu Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab paved on the platform around the dhvajastaṁbha of the Kēśava temple.
This is dated Śaka 1469, Plavaṅga, Mārgaśira ba. 5, corresponding to 1547 A.D., December 1, Thursday.

It registers remission of the several taxes such as Siddhāyam, Kāvali-pannu, etc., due by the barbers of Koṟapāḍu situated in Ghaṇḍikōṭa-sīma by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Nandēḷa Timmarājayyadēva Mahārāju by the order of the king at the instance of Rāmarājayadēva Mahārāju.
[Published in Inscription of Andhra Pradesh, Cuddapah District, part II, No. 192.]

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī vijayā
bhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁ
bulu 1469 Agunēṁṭi plavaṁ
ga saṁvatsara mā¨rgasira ba 5 lu .
śrī¨rmamahārājādhirāja
rājaparamēśvara śrī vīra
pratāpa śrī sadāśiva
dēva mahārāyalu vija
yanagaramaṁdu ratna siṁhā
sanārūḍhuṁḍai prithivi sā
rājyaṁ sēyucuṁnuṁ
ḍagānu śrī¨rmamahāmaṁ
ḍalēsvara naṁdēla tiṁmarā
jaya dēvamahārājulu yi
cina śilāśāsanaṁ . sadāsi
va dēvamahārāyala Ānati
ni rāmarājadēvamahārāyaṁ
jula mudalanu gaṁḍikōṭa
ku cellē grāmaṁ korapāṭa maṁ
galavāripaṁnnu sidhāyaṁ
ki kāvili sa
hā sa¨rvamānyaṁgānu
mā nistimi . yī dha¨rmmāniki
yavaru tappinānu
vusa ti
navāru cellelikiṁnni talli
kiṁnni tapinavāru gōbrāṁ
hani caṁpina pātakāna pō
duru .
Digital edition of SII 37.318 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
